title: Matter trace precheck

commands.command: claude --add-dir /tmp --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode bypassPermissions --no-session-persistence --tools Read --allowedTools Read --disallowedTools Bash,Edit,Write,MultiEdit,NotebookEdit,Grep,Glob --output-format stream-json --include-partial-messages --verbose -p <review prompt>
commands.summary: Single valid completed read-only S04 Claude review completed against /tmp/lfos-rp00-p02-m05-s04-review-packet.diff.
Final S04 closeout gate rerun after evidence creation

notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data was used.

All commands are local validation, parser, test, Claude read-only review, or git whitespace checks; none execute service logic, create runtime routes, evaluate runtime permission, call an AuthZ evaluator, run a permission engine, apply security trimming, append audit ledgers, write audit events, write databases, write storage, persist product state, mutate entity registries, replace human approval, or create runtime product behavior.
Pre-closeout npm run rp00:control-plane:validate failed only because S04 evidence files were intentionally not created yet; this command is rerun after evidence creation as the final gate.

Claude C00 valid completed review ran once using cli requested claude-opus-4-8 effort=max read-only packet review. Claude self-reported effort high in its final JSON while the command invocation records --effort max. Claude rated the S04 implementation safe_to_close with no P0/P1/P2 findings and one non-blocking informational advisory.

evidence_summary.claude_review_dependency: C00 actual claude-opus-4-8 max read-only review required before production_ready
evidence_summary.human_approval_boundary: Human approval is not replaced or synthesized by deterministic synthetic Permission And Audit Binding Matter trace precheck because no sensitive production mutation, client-facing output, external sharing, finance action, real data operation, runtime execution, permission engine execution, AuthZ evaluation, security trimming execution, audit write, storage write, database write, or product-state write occurs.
evidence_summary.permission_audit_binding_boundary: S04 prechecks metadata-only Matter trace after S03 tenant boundary, carries S01, S02, S03, S14, and RP00.P00.M04.S01 refs, denies Matter-required missing-Matter and orphan Matter-tenant traces with blocked refs, fails closed on unsafe claims, keeps RP00.P02.M05 open, and hands off to RP00.P02.M05.S05.
